title: Markets mixed amid subdued trading
summary:
Main
A lack of progress towards a peace deal in Ukraine pushed oil higher. However, a stronger USD weighed on investor appetite across the reset of the complex. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2025-08-19 112143.png | assets/2025-08-19_markets-mixed-amid-subdued-trading_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_d50076e6180a.png

Market Commentary
Crude oil prices gained as expectations of a ceasefire in Ukraine fell.

children.title: Main
children.summary: A lack of progress towards a peace deal in Ukraine pushed oil higher. However, a stronger USD weighed on investor appetite across the reset of the complex.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Crude oil prices gained as expectations of a ceasefire in Ukraine fell. Zelenskiy said during a meeting with Trump at the White House that Russia and Ukraine would need to find diplomatic ways to end the war.

children.title: Chart of the Day
children.summary: LNG has become increasingly imports for Europe as piped gas from Russia drys up. LNG markets have been able to withstand the additional demand from Europe to date, much due to weaker imports from China.
